items.title: The February jobs numbers are coming out Friday. Here's what to expect
items.description: Economists surveyed by Dow Jones expect payroll growth of 50,000, following January's surprisingly high 130,000.

items.title: Private companies added 63,000 jobs in February, January revised to just 11,000 additions, ADP says
Middle East conflict poses fresh test to central banks as oil shock fuels inflation
items.description: Middle East conflict has posed a fresh test to central banks, with fears of an oil shock and renewed inflation risks changing their bid to shore up gr...

items.title: Why Iran should not count on allies Russia and China to come to its aid
items.description: Iran's closest allies, Russia and China, have not offered material support to it, exposing the hard limits of its "strategic" partnerships.

items.title: As Trump declares inflation tamed, Iran conflict threatens new price pressures
items.description: The conflict involving Iran threatens another price spike that could undermine the president's central case for lower interest rates.
